hypotheses.label: Typhoid

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Although abdominal symptoms are present, the severe weakness and high fever are more indicative of Typhoid

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Malaria typically presents with chills and rigors, which are not mentioned here
